question: Show the name and theme for all concerts and the number of singers in each concert.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.concert_name ,  T2.theme ,  count(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN concert AS T2 ON T1.concert_id  =  T2.concert_id GROUP BY T2.concert_id
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2, T1.col_3, count(*) FROM concert AS T1 JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 GROUP BY T1.col_1
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2, T1.col_3, count(*) FROM concert AS T1 JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 GROUP BY T1.col_1
